title: Strata — an optimizing compiler to WebAssembly
description: A from-scratch optimizing compiler that turns a small C-like language into real WebAssembly bytecode in your browser: SSA, SCCP/GVN/LICM/DCE/inlining, if-conversion to branchless select, and a relooper backend. Now with a genuine 64-bit long type lowering to wasm i64 (BigInt-exact wrapping, hex/L literals, long[] arrays, str(long)) and bit-manipulation primitives (popcount/clz/ctz/rotl/rotr) — alongside do-while/switch, a string standard library, str[] arrays (split/join), a step debugger, and a differential test suite proving the wasm matches a reference interpreter at every opt level (388 checks across -O0..-O3).
